import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react'; import { Link, NavLink, useNavigate} from 'react-router-dom'; import constFlaskURL from '../../hooks/constFlaskURL' import { readRows, getRow, deleteRow } from '../../crud/crud'; import { transformDataForTable } from '../../consts/transformDataForTable'; import { handleLogout } from '../../consts/handleLogout'; import '../../App.css'; import '../../../node_modules/bootstrap/dist/css/bootstrap.css' function Users() { const [userData, setUserData] = useState(null); const [tableData, setTableData] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false); const navigate = useNavigate(); const fetchTableData = useCallback(async () => { setLoading(true); try { const response = await constFlaskURL.get('/users'); if (response.status === 200) { setTableData(Array.isArray(response.data) ? response.data : [response.data]); } } catch (err) { console.log(err); } finally { setLoading(false); } }, []); useEffect(() => { fetchTableData(); }, [fetchTableData]); const transformedData = transformDataForTable(tableData); return (
